phases.label: MicroPython Basics
phases.description: Run Python on ESP32, Raspberry Pi Pico, and other microcontrollers.

topics.label: Setup & Flashing
topics.description: Flash MicroPython firmware to ESP32/Pico. Connect with REPL via serial.

topics.label: GPIO & Pins
topics.description: machine.Pin for digital I/O. Read buttons, control LEDs.

topics.label: PWM & ADC
topics.description: Analog input (ADC) and pulse-width modulation (PWM) for motors and dimming.

topics.label: I2C & SPI
topics.description: Communicate with sensors and displays over I2C and SPI buses.

topics.label: WiFi & Networking
topics.description: Connect to WiFi, make HTTP requests, run a web server.

topics.label: File System
topics.description: Read/write files on the flash file system. Store config and data.
